body.title: D330: Learning circuit regression — replay cloud escalations
body.result: cloud_escalations table + record_cloud_escalation() in forensic_logger. Wired into main.py tier selection. Synthetic tests: greetings stay local, simple questions stay local, complex tasks escalate. Live replay mode (--live) with channel + file alerts on regression. 1880 tests pass.
body.description: Replay historical inputs that previously escalated to cloud. If same input on same topic escalates again, learning circuit has a gap. Direct measure of D316 cloud escape rate. MUST raise visible alert on failure — not a silent metric.
